data: {"generalSituation":"Winds will be weak over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. It will be rather warm during the day and relatively humid with mist patches in the morning and at night. An easterly airstream will affect the coast of southern China over the weekend. It will be slightly cloudier over the region. A trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260325","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy periods in the morning and at night.
